diagrams.title: Boot Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the complete sequence from power-on to OS loading
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the sequential process of how a computer starts up and loads the operating system

diagrams.title: OS Generation Components
diagrams.description: Illustrates the main components that are configured during OS Generation
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing all the parts that need to be configured and customized when generating an operating system for specific hardware
